chapter_title: Permitted number of students per employer
snippet: An employer is not permitted to employ more than one work experience student for every 3 employees at the workplace. However, an employer may engage more than the permitted number of students if the following conditions are met: Cancellation of work experience Includes information on cancelling work experience. Travel and accommodation arrangements Includes information on travel and accommodation arrangement... Includes information on the permitted number of work experience students per employer. Reviewed 24 July 2025
